title: US-Israel Launch Massive Strikes on Iran: Supreme Leader Khamenei Killed, 130+ Cities Attacked
excerpt: The US and Israel launched an unprecedented military operation against Iran on February 28, 2026, killing Supreme Leader Khamenei and striking over 2,000 targets across 130+ cities. Iran has retaliated with missiles targeting Israel and six Gulf states.

title: Oil Prices Surge 8% as Iran Conflict Threatens Strait of Hormuz — Global Economic Shockwave Begins
excerpt: Crude oil surges past $79 per barrel as the US-Israel Iran war threatens the Strait of Hormuz — the world's most critical energy chokepoint. Stocks plunge, gas prices rising, and economists warn of global inflationary shockwave.
